stomach_abdomen.text: Nausea; pain in stomach and bowels; flatulence

keynotes.text: color="#800000">MICROMERIA DOUGLASII Yerba Buena (MICROMERIA) A California mint-like plant acting on stomach and bowels. Used as a tea to cure colic and relieve flatulence. Is a pleasant beverage and febrifuge, blood purifyer and tonic.
